title: DataVizNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-data-viz-rs (dashboards, alerts, self-service analytics). The server publishes alert-rule firings and workbook/dashboard publish events as a best-effort fan-out, and exposes a notification-dispatch lane consumed by notifiers. Payloads carry a dd.dataviz.v1 envelope and must not contain row-level query results or secrets.

$dd:nats.summary: Dashboard alert + publish fan-out plus notification-dispatch lane.

subjects.name: DataVizAlertsEvents
subjects.description: Fan-out emitted when a dashboard alert rule fires or resolves. Carries alert id, rule, severity, and the triggering metric summary (not the underlying rows). Default for DATAVIZ_ALERTS_EVENT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.dataviz.alerts.events

subjects.name: DataVizNotificationsDispatch
subjects.description: Outbound notification-dispatch requests (email/webhook/in-app) consumed by notifier workers. Subscribed with the dd-data-viz-notifiers queue group so each notification is delivered once. Default for DATAVIZ_NOTIFICATIONS_DISPATCH_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.dataviz.notifications.dispatch

subjects.name: DataVizPublishEvents
subjects.description: Fan-out emitted when a workbook or dashboard is published or republished. Carries workbook/dashboard id, owner, and version (not the rendered payload). Default for DATAVIZ_PUBLISH_EVENT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.dataviz.publish.events

queueGroups.name: DataVizNotificationDispatchQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by dd-data-viz notifier workers consuming the notification-dispatch lane.
